dataNote: Live flight data from AeroDataBox API. 6-day window captured in 12h windows. Status: Expected vs Departed. Scans 2x/day (every 12h).

airlines.name: Emirates
airlines.summary: Operating a reduced flight schedule following partial reopening of regional airspace. Travel waiver in effect for Feb 28 - Apr 15 travelers.

airlines.name: Qatar Airways
airlines.summary: Resuming expanded network via dedicated flight corridors. 90+ destinations restored as of Mar 26. Schedule valid to Apr 15. Waiver: bookings Feb 28-Jun 15 eligible for free changes or refund.

airlines.name: Etihad Airways
airlines.summary: Travel advisory page not accessible this scan cycle. Etihad is Abu Dhabi-based and less impacted by Qatari airspace closure, but may face corridor restrictions.
